settings_view.title: Settings
settings_view.heading: Workspace Controls
settings_view.description: Adjust data density, update behavior, and interface preferences with a quieter view.
settings_view.compact_table_desc: Reduce table row height to see more data at once.
settings_view.auto_refresh_desc: Ask local service to update institution signals periodically when filters change.
settings_view.openrouter_desc: Enable AI summaries for stock analysis and AI Picks with default free model.
settings_view.api_key_hint: Key stored on server · save empty to keep existing key.
settings_view.terminal_note_1: ⌘K / Ctrl+K opens command palette from anywhere for faster stock code search.
settings_view.terminal_note_2: Theme adjusts automatically. Manual adjustment still available in top right corner.
settings_view.terminal_note_3: Scanner results delayed 15 minutes unless workspace connected to advanced premium data stream.
settings_view.terminal_note_4: Default free models: {{stock_model}} for stock analysis and {{picks_model}} for AI Picks.
settings_view.terminal_note_5: If status changes to OpenRouter needs review, provider usually responds with message like OpenRouter API key rejected by provider and key needs replacement.

help_view.title: Help
help_view.heading: Help Center
help_view.description: Quick guide for screener workflow, portfolio, watchlist, and handling RetailBijak operational issues.
help_view.quick_start_value: Start scanning, save candidates, then configure workspace settings
help_view.step_1_desc: Go to screener page, select active timeframe, then run SwingAQ scan to find strongest candidates.
help_view.step_2_desc: Check CCI, magic line, and volume spike from scan results, then open ticker detail to validate price structure.
help_view.step_3_desc: Save selected stocks to watchlist or portfolio for faster and more consistent monitoring next time.
help_view.faq_1_a: SwingAQ is an institutional scanning engine that analyzes accumulation based on CCI, magic line (MA), and volume spike to detect potential swing trading candidates.
help_view.faq_2_a: Scanner requires updated OHLCV data. Make sure scheduler is running (check 09:00 & 15:30 WIB). If still empty, try refresh or run scan again.
help_view.faq_3_q: How do I add stocks to portfolio?
help_view.faq_3_a: Open Portfolio page, click Add, then fill in stock code, lot quantity, and average price. Data is saved to database and synced across sessions.
help_view.faq_4_q: What's the difference between Watchlist and Portfolio?
help_view.faq_4_a: Watchlist is for monitoring target stocks without ownership data. Portfolio is for recording positions you own with average price and lot quantity.
help_view.faq_5_a: Price data is updated via scheduler from Yahoo Finance at 09:00 and 15:30 WIB. Not real-time streaming — use technical indicators for confirmation.
help_view.faq_6_q: How do I enable AI Picks?
help_view.faq_6_a: Go to Settings, enter OpenRouter API key, then save. Once active, AI Picks will show language model-based recommendations daily.
help_view.support_desc: Learn RetailBijak workflow: from scanning, analysis, to portfolio management.
